name: @kyter/simalytics-ios
description: Release notes and changelog tooling for Simalytics iOS.

scripts.version: node scripts/release/ios-release.mjs notes --write-default --allow-empty && changeset version && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts && node scripts/release/ios-release.mjs sync-xcode-version && node scripts/release/ios-release.mjs check
